vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)

parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

verify.rule: All required fields are present and filled.
Mass estimate is within expected range for the subsystem.

All interfaces have reciprocal connections with neighboring subsystems.

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to uneven heat distribution.
risk.mit: Implement additional cooling channels and thermal management strategies.

risk.desc: Risk of cable damage due to unsupported routing.
risk.mit: Ensure all cables have strain relief and are routed through protected channels.

risk.desc: Risk of harmonic drive misalignment during assembly.
risk.mit: Use precise alignment tools and follow assembly sequence carefully.

risk.desc: Risk of base plate deformation under high torque loads.
risk.mit: Increase structural reinforcement and use thicker material in critical areas.

risk.desc: Risk of inadequate service access for maintenance.
risk.mit: Ensure all critical components have clear access paths and labels.

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to heat dissipation from joint components.
risk.mit: Implement thermal management solutions such as heat sinks or cooling channels.

risk.desc: Risk of cable damage due to inadequate strain relief at joint entry/exit points.
risk.mit: Ensure proper strain relief and slack loops for harnesses crossing joints.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly due to lack of precise alignment jigs.
risk.mit: Use alignment jigs and precision tools during assembly.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient preload on critical fasteners leading to joint failure.
risk.mit: Ensure proper torque settings and use locking mechanisms on fasteners.

risk.desc: Risk of cable routing interference with joint motion due to poor design.
risk.mit: Optimize cable routing paths to avoid pinch points and ensure clearance.

verify.rule: verify must include a boundary_conditions object: fixture_points [{at:[x,y,z], type:fixed|pinned|roller}], thermal_zones [{at:[x,y,z], W_or_degC:number, role:source|sink}], pressure_faces [{face:string, Pa:number}] for downstream CFD/FEA.

risk.desc: Potential thermal hotspots near the driver_bay_shell due to high power dissipation.
risk.mit: Implement additional cooling channels or fins in the driver_bay_shell.

risk.desc: Risk of signal interference due to insufficient separation between power_channel and signal_channel.
risk.mit: Increase physical separation between power_channel and signal_channel, or add shielding.

risk.mit: Design the service cover to be removable without tools or ensure sufficient clearance.

risk.mit: Increase the size of the mounting flange or use self-tapping screws.

risk.desc: Thermal inspection window may not provide adequate visibility into the driver_bay.
risk.mit: Enlarge the thermal inspection window or add a mirror for better visibility.
